item.name: Seafaring Toad
item.description:
The first sailors to spy one of these odd creatures at sea thought they had taken leave of their senses, or at the very least, had taken a wrong turn and somehow ended up in a pond.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: To all intents and purposes, this appears to be an ordinary toad...swimming in the middle of the ocean. One wonders if life on the high seas was more preferable to being an experimental subject for the inventive minds of Idyllshire.
